title: Google Sheets node returns Error 400: invalid_request
symptom: When attempting to authenticate the Google Sheets node, n8n throws 'Error 400: invalid_request'. This occurs due to a missing 'https://' in the redirect URI.
not_this_if: Redirect URI is correctly set with 'https://'
root_cause: The error occurs because the redirect URI generated by n8n is missing the 'https://' prefix. This mismatch prevents Google from recognizing the request as valid, leading to the 400 error.
fix_steps: Add the following lines: N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL=https://your-domain.com and WEBHOOK_URL=https://your-domain.com
Try connecting the Google Sheets node again
agent_instruction: Update the docker-compose file with the correct base URL and restart the container.
